title: cyclophyllum subsessile
intro: Cyclophyllum subsessile is a plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in the Pacific Islands, and is also known as the "Kava Tree" due to its similarity in appearance to the Kava plant (Piper methysticum). The medicinal properties of Cyclophyllum subsessile are mainly attributed to its roots, which have been traditionally used for their anti-inflammatory and anxiolytic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate pain and inflammation. Cyclophyllum subsessile is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical oil, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
